header.tooltip: Click to expand the full header captured by PHD2 for this section (equipment, mount, algorithms, target coords)

recents.title: Recent
recents.showTooltip: Show recently-opened logs (stored locally in your browser)
recents.clearAllTooltip: Permanently delete all recently-opened logs from your browser's local storage

folder.title: Logs folder
folder.changeTooltip: Pick a different folder; replaces the current one
folder.forgetTooltip: Clear the saved folder handle from this browser
folder.unsupported: Folder browsing requires a Chromium-based browser (Chrome or Edge). Drag a log onto the drop zone to load one.
folder.chooseTooltip: Open the OS folder picker; the browser will ask for read access
folder.reconnectTooltip: Re-grant read access for this session
folder.reconnectHint: Re-grant read access to restore the folder listing.
folder.noLogs: No guide logs found in this folder. Add a `*GuideLog*` file or pick a different folder.
